  1. com.runticket.model

Uses of Package
com.runticket.model

Packages that use com.runticket.model
Package
Description
com.runticket.model
Models for the RunTicket application.
com.runticket.service
Services for the RunTicket application.
com.runticket.view
Views for the RunTicket application.
  • Classes in com.runticket.model used by com.runticket.model
    Class
    Description
    Customer
    The Customer class represents a customer with personal details, membership status, balance, and a list of invoices for purchased tickets.
    Event
    The Event class represents an event with details such as name, date, time, type, cost, venue, tickets, seating, and invoices.
    Information
    Singleton class that holds the main data structures for events, customers, and venues.
    Invoice
    The Invoice class represents an invoice for a ticket purchase by a Customer for a specific event.
    Tickets
    The Tickets class represents a ticket with a tier, price, quantity, and percentage available.
    Venue
    The Venue interface defines the methods that any venue type must implement.
  • Classes in com.runticket.model used by com.runticket.service
    Class
    Description
    Customer
    The Customer class represents a customer with personal details, membership status, balance, and a list of invoices for purchased tickets.
    Event
    The Event class represents an event with details such as name, date, time, type, cost, venue, tickets, seating, and invoices.
    Invoice
    The Invoice class represents an invoice for a ticket purchase by a Customer for a specific event.
    Venue
    The Venue interface defines the methods that any venue type must implement.
  • Classes in com.runticket.model used by com.runticket.view
    Class
    Description
    Customer
    The Customer class represents a customer with personal details, membership status, balance, and a list of invoices for purchased tickets.
    Event
    The Event class represents an event with details such as name, date, time, type, cost, venue, tickets, seating, and invoices.
    Invoice
    The Invoice class represents an invoice for a ticket purchase by a Customer for a specific event.
    Venue
    The Venue interface defines the methods that any venue type must implement.
